Container.Name: nebularr-postgres
Container.Overview:
PostgreSQL for Nebularr (same role as [i]docker-compose.yml[/i] [i]postgres[/i] service).
[b]Before first install:[/b] - Docker → Networks → add a custom bridge network named [b]nebularr[/b] (must match [i]Network[/i] above). - On the host, use [i]/mnt/user/appdata/nebularr/init[/i] and copy [i]docker/postgres/init/00_roles.sql[/i] from the Nebularr repo into it (required on first DB init). - Map that folder read-only to [i]/docker-entrypoint-initdb.d[/i] below (same paths as [i]deploy/unraid/docker-compose.yml[/i]).
[b]Start order:[/b] Start this container before Nebularr. Init SQL runs only when the data directory is empty.

Config.Name: Postgres TCP (optional)
Config.Description: Publish Postgres for host/backup tools. Nebularr only needs it on the Docker network.

Config.Name: Init scripts (00_roles.sql)
Config.Description: Must contain 00_roles.sql from the repo on first install.

Config.Name: POSTGRES_USER
Config.Description: Superuser created by the official Postgres image.
